evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of a temporary booking page that expires after the meeting. However, the evidence only confirms that bookings are created and confirmed, without any indication that the booking links are temporary or that they expire after the meeting. The linked use case mentions a temporary link that expires after the meeting, but there is no evidence provided to confirm that this functionality is implemented or functioning as required.
gaps: No evidence of the temporary booking link functionality or expiration mechanism.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
